Example_EN: She bought a jacket from a famous brand yesterday.
Example_CN: 她昨天买了一件名牌夹克。

Example_EN: She felt brave enough to speak in front of the class.
Example_CN: 她鼓起勇气在全班面前发言。

Example_EN: Please breathe deeply before you start the race.
Example_CN: 起跑前请先深呼吸。
MemoryTip: breathe 是动词；breath 是名词。

Collocation: out of breath;take a breath;bad breath
Example_EN: She was out of breath after running up the stairs.
Example_CN: 跑上楼梯后她气喘吁吁。
MemoryTip: breath：一次呼吸的气；勿与 breathe 混淆。

Example_EN: The bride looked beautiful in her white dress.
Example_CN: 新娘穿着白礼服看起来很美。

Collocation: cross a bridge;bridge over;under the bridge
Example_EN: We walked across the old bridge after dinner.
Example_CN: 晚饭后我们走过那座旧桥。

Example_EN: The manager gave a brief speech at the start.
Example_CN: 经理一开始做了简短讲话。

Example_EN: She is a bright student in our English class.
Example_CN: 她是我们英语班里聪明的学生。

Example_EN: That was a brilliant idea for our school project.
Example_CN: 那对我们学校项目来说是个绝妙主意。
MemoryTip: brilliant：亮得耀眼，也指表现极佳。

Example_EN: He gave us a broad smile when we arrived.
Example_CN: 我们到时他露出灿烂的笑容。
MemoryTip: broad：宽阔；比 wide 更偏面积感。

Example_EN: The match will be broadcast live on television tonight.
Example_CN: 今晚比赛将在电视上直播。

Example_EN: Please brush your teeth before you go to bed.
Example_CN: 睡觉前请刷牙。

Example_EN: We need a careful budget for our holiday trip.
Example_CN: 我们需要为假期旅行做仔细预算。

Example_EN: They work in a tall office building in the city.
Example_CN: 他们在市里一栋高办公楼里工作。

Example_EN: The police found a bullet near the old wall.
Example_CN: 警方在旧墙附近发现一颗子弹。

Collocation: bunch of flowers;bunch of keys;a bunch of
Example_EN: He gave her a bunch of flowers on her birthday.
Example_CN: 生日时他送了她一束花。

Example_EN: Be careful not to burn the toast this morning.
Example_CN: 今早小心别把吐司烤糊了。

Collocation: burst into tears;burst open;burst of laughter
Example_EN: She burst into tears when she heard the news.
Example_CN: 听到消息时她突然大哭起来。

Collocation: bury a body;bury in;bury your face
Example_EN: Dogs sometimes bury bones in the garden.
Example_CN: 狗有时会把骨头埋在花园里。
MemoryTip: bury：埋进土里；注意发音像 berry。

Example_EN: I usually go to school by bus every morning.
Example_CN: 我通常每天早上坐公交去学校。

Example_EN: My father is away on a business trip this week.
Example_CN: 我父亲这周出差去了。

Example_EN: Please press the green button to open the door.
Example_CN: 请按绿色按钮开门。

Example_EN: The buyer asked many questions about the flat.
Example_CN: 买家问了许多关于公寓的问题。

Example_EN: Please put the cups back in the kitchen cabinet.
Example_CN: 请把杯子放回厨房橱柜。

Example_EN: The new cable connects the computer to the wall.
Example_CN: 新电缆把电脑连到墙上。

Example_EN: The bird flew out when I opened the cage.
Example_CN: 我打开笼子时鸟飞了出去。

Collocation: calculate the cost;calculate carefully;hard to calculate
Example_EN: Can you calculate the total cost of these books?
Example_CN: 你能算出这些书的总价吗？

Example_EN: My calculation of the bill was wrong by two pounds.
Example_CN: 我对账单的计算差了两英镑。

Collocation: wall calendar;calendar year;mark on the calendar
Example_EN: Please mark the exam date on your calendar.
Example_CN: 请在日历上标出考试日期。

Example_EN: We saw a newborn calf on the farm trip.
Example_CN: 农场之旅我们看见一头新生小牛。

Example_EN: Please stay calm and listen carefully now.
Example_CN: 请保持冷静，现在仔细听。
MemoryTip: calm：平静；心情或天气都不乱。

Collocation: ride a camel;camel in the desert;camel hair
Example_EN: Tourists like to ride a camel in the desert.
Example_CN: 游客喜欢在沙漠里骑骆驼。

Example_EN: They started a campaign to clean the local river.
Example_CN: 他们发起清洁当地河流的运动。
MemoryTip: campaign：持续推进的活动或战役。

Example_EN: The students live on campus during term time.
Example_CN: 学生们学期中住在校园里。

Example_EN: We walked along the canal after Sunday lunch.
Example_CN: 周日午饭后我们沿着运河散步。

Collocation: cancel a meeting;cancel a flight;cancel out
Example_EN: They had to cancel the picnic because of rain.
Example_CN: 因为下雨，他们不得不取消野餐。

Example_EN: Doctors are doing important cancer research today.
Example_CN: 医生们正在做重要的癌症研究。

Example_EN: She is a strong candidate for the team leader.
Example_CN: 她是队长职位的有力候选人。

Example_EN: Please light a candle for the birthday cake.
Example_CN: 请为生日蛋糕点上蜡烛。

Example_EN: The child asked for a piece of candy after lunch.
Example_CN: 孩子午饭后要了一颗糖。
MemoryTip: candy 偏美式；英式常说 sweet。

Collocation: baseball cap;put on a cap;bottle cap
Example_EN: He wore a baseball cap to the sports day.
Example_CN: 他运动会那天戴着棒球帽。
MemoryTip: cap：无檐或短檐帽，也指标盖。

Example_EN: She is capable of finishing the work alone.
Example_CN: 她有能力独自完成这项工作。

Example_EN: The hall has a seating capacity of two hundred.
Example_CN: 礼堂可容纳两百个座位。

Example_EN: Tom is the captain of our school football team.
Example_CN: 汤姆是我们学校足球队的队长。

Collocation: capture an animal;capture the moment;capture attention
Example_EN: The photo captured the moment of their victory.
Example_CN: 照片捕捉到了他们获胜的瞬间。

Example_EN: Trees help reduce carbon dioxide in the air.
Example_CN: 树木有助于减少空气中的二氧化碳。

Example_EN: Please take care when you cross the busy road.
Example_CN: 过繁忙马路时请小心。

Example_EN: She wants a career in medicine after university.
Example_CN: 她大学毕业后想从事医学事业。

Example_EN: Be careful with that sharp kitchen knife.
Example_CN: 请小心那把锋利的厨房刀。

Example_EN: He made a careless mistake in the last question.
Example_CN: 他在最后一题犯了粗心错误。

Example_EN: Please do not walk on the wet carpet with shoes.
Example_CN: 请不要穿着鞋在湿地毯上走。

Example_EN: We visited an old castle on our school trip.
Example_CN: 学校旅行时我们参观了一座古城堡。

Example_EN: Which category does this book belong to?
Example_CN: 这本书属于哪个类别？

Example_EN: There were many cattle in the field near the road.
Example_CN: 路边田里有许多牛。

Example_EN: Heavy rain was the main cause of the flood.
Example_CN: 大雨是这次洪水的主要原因。

Example_EN: The explorers walked carefully into the dark cave.
Example_CN: 探险者小心地走进黑暗洞穴。

Example_EN: There is a bright light on the classroom ceiling.
Example_CN: 教室天花板上有一盏明亮的灯。

Example_EN: We will celebrate her birthday with a small party.
Example_CN: 我们将用小型派对庆祝她的生日。

Example_EN: The celebration of the new year lasted all night.
Example_CN: 新年庆祝活动持续了一整夜。

Example_EN: Scientists studied a blood cell under the microscope.
Example_CN: 科学家在显微镜下研究一个血细胞。

Example_EN: The sweet costs fifty cents at this small shop.
Example_CN: 这家小店的糖要五十美分。
MemoryTip: cent：百分之一货币单位；per cent 相关。

Example_EN: The opening ceremony will start at nine o'clock.
Example_CN: 开幕式将在九点开始。

Example_EN: I feel certain that we will meet again soon.
Example_CN: 我确信我们很快会再见面。

Example_EN: She received a certificate after the English course.
Example_CN: 英语课程结束后她拿到了证书。

Example_EN: There is a chain of coffee shops in this city.
Example_CN: 这座城市有连锁咖啡店。

Example_EN: The chairman opened the meeting with a short speech.
Example_CN: 主席用简短讲话宣布会议开始。
MemoryTip: chair + man：主持会议的人（也可用 chair）。

Example_EN: Learning a new language is a big challenge for me.
Example_CN: 学一门新语言对我来说是大挑战。

Example_EN: She became the school swimming champion last year.
Example_CN: 她去年成为学校游泳冠军。

Example_EN: Which TV channel is showing the football match?
Example_CN: 哪个电视频道在播足球赛？

Example_EN: Please read the first chapter before Friday.
Example_CN: 请在周五前阅读第一章。

Example_EN: Harry is the main character in this story.
Example_CN: 哈利是这个故事的主角。

Example_EN: Patience is a characteristic of a good teacher.
Example_CN: 耐心是好老师的一个特征。

Collocation: in charge of;charge a fee;charge a phone
Example_EN: Who is in charge of the school library today?
Example_CN: 今天谁负责学校图书馆？

Collocation: charity work;raise money for charity;charity shop
Example_EN: They raised money for charity at the school fair.
Example_CN: 他们在学校义卖会上为慈善筹款。

Example_EN: The old town has a special charm in spring.
Example_CN: 这座古镇春天别有魅力。

Example_EN: This chart shows how sales grew last year.
Example_CN: 这张图表显示去年销量如何增长。

Example_EN: The dog tried to chase the cat across the garden.
Example_CN: 狗想追着猫穿过花园。

Example_EN: I had a nice chat with my neighbour this morning.
Example_CN: 今早我和邻居愉快地聊了一会儿。

Collocation: cheat in an exam;cheat someone;cheat at cards
Example_EN: Students must not cheat in any school exam.
Example_CN: 学生不得在任何学校考试中作弊。

Example_EN: Please check your answers before you hand them in.
Example_CN: 交卷前请检查答案。
MemoryTip: check：检查；英式支票多用 cheque。

Collocation: red cheeks;kiss on the cheek;cheek of
Example_EN: Cold weather made the children's cheeks turn red.
Example_CN: 寒冷天气让孩子们脸颊发红。

Example_EN: Fans began to cheer when their team scored.
Example_CN: 本队进球时球迷开始欢呼。

Collocation: head chef;chef of;train as a chef
Example_EN: The chef prepared a special meal for the guests.
Example_CN: 厨师为客人准备了特制餐食。

Example_EN: The teacher explained a simple chemical reaction.
Example_CN: 老师讲解了一个简单的化学反应。
MemoryTip: chemical：与化学有关的物质/反应。

Example_EN: We have a chemistry lesson on Wednesday afternoons.
Example_CN: 我们周三下午有化学课。

Collocation: write a cheque;pay by cheque;blank cheque
Example_EN: He paid for the sofa by cheque last week.
Example_CN: 他上周用支票付了沙发的钱。
MemoryTip: 英式支票拼 cheque；美式常写 check。

Collocation: chest pain;chest of drawers;hit in the chest
Example_EN: He felt a sharp pain in his chest after running.
Example_CN: 跑步后他感到胸口剧痛。

Example_EN: The chief reason for the delay was heavy traffic.
Example_CN: 延误的主要原因是交通拥堵。

Example_EN: She spent her childhood in a quiet village.
Example_CN: 她在安静的乡村度过童年。
MemoryTip: child + hood：做孩子的那段时期。

Example_EN: Fish and chips is a popular meal in Britain.
Example_CN: 炸鱼薯条在英国是受欢迎的餐食。
MemoryTip: chip：薯片/薯条，也指芯片碎屑。

Example_EN: You have a choice between tea and coffee.
Example_CN: 你可以在茶和咖啡之间选择。

Example_EN: They got married in a small village church.
Example_CN: 他们在一座小乡村教堂结婚。

Collocation: smoke a cigarette;cigarette smoke;packet of cigarettes
Example_EN: Please do not smoke a cigarette inside this building.
Example_CN: 请不要在这栋楼内抽香烟。

Collocation: draw a circle;circle of friends;in a circle
Example_EN: Please draw a large circle on the whiteboard.
Example_CN: 请在白板上画一个大圆。

Collocation: in these circumstances;under no circumstances;special circumstances
Example_EN: Under no circumstances should you open that door.
Example_CN: 在任何情况下你都不应该开那扇门。
MemoryTip: circumstance：周围具体情境（常用复数）。

Example_EN: She became a British citizen after many years.
Example_CN: 多年后她成为了英国公民。
MemoryTip: city → citizen：某国/城市的合法居民。

Example_EN: Civil rights protect people in a free society.
Example_CN: 公民权利保护自由社会中的人们。

Collocation: claim that;make a claim;claim a prize
Example_EN: He claims that he saw a strange light last night.
Example_CN: 他声称昨晚看见奇怪的光。

Example_EN: Please clap your hands for our next speaker.
Example_CN: 请为下一位演讲者鼓掌。

Example_EN: Pride and Prejudice is a classic English novel.
Example_CN: 《傲慢与偏见》是一部经典英语小说。
MemoryTip: classic：经得起时间考验的经典。
